raw_consumer_statement:
Barclays Bank allowed a stranger become an authorized user on my account WITHOUT my knowledge, permission, or authorization! They then mailed a new card to this imposter in a different state WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE. 
This occurred XX/XX/year>. I found out when stranger charged {$900.00} twice in cash deposit on XX/XX/year> & XX/XX/year> along with car rental of {$250.00} on XX/XX/year> and {$45.00} twice for cash advance fee. I called Barclays to report fraud. Later I found out it wasnt reported on XX/XX/year>. It was forgotten. I repeatedly called and spent countless hours on the phone through XXXX, XXXX & XXXX. They have NO CORRESPONDENCE with me. Said to be patient its being investigated. My interest and fees are racking up and credit score has plummeted. I am NEVER LATE on any payments. Ive done everything right. They ignore me and expect me to pay. And theyre ruining my life. They do not respond and lie to me. They have not protected me against fraud and they sent a card of my account to an unknown person WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE OR APPROVAL
